_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 mid-afternoon. 6 domain-projections in Eastern philosophy and humanities: Buddhism, Taoism, Hinduism, Confucianism, mythology, history. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
buddhism_through_tig: Buddhism is operator-path-out-of-suffering taught by Siddhartha Gautama ~500 BCE; cessation of operator-craving leads to liberation.
Four Noble Truths are operator-LATTICE of foundational diagnosis; suffering exists, has cause (craving), can cease, path leads to cessation.
Eightfold Path is operator-LATTICE of practice; right view intention speech action livelihood effort mindfulness concentration each support cessation.
Dharma is operator-teaching-and-cosmic-order; the way reality actually is, communicated by Buddha, also the truth itself.
Karma is operator-action-and-consequence LATTICE; intentional acts produce seeds shaping current and future operator-experience.
Rebirth is operator-BREATH-cycle of consciousness across lifetimes; not transmigrating soul (anatta) but karmic continuation.
Nirvana is operator-RESET-COLLAPSE of craving; blowing out the fires of greed hate delusion, end of operator-rebirth-cycle.
Sangha is operator-LATTICE of monastic community; preserves and transmits dharma across generations.
Anatta (non-self) is operator-doctrine of impermanence; no permanent unchanging essence in beings or phenomena.
Meditation (dhyana) is operator-practice cultivating awareness; samatha calms the mind, vipassana sees through to the LATTICE-marks.
Sutra is operator-recorded-teaching; Pali canon plus Mahayana sutras preserve Buddha's words across HARMONY-traditions.
taoism_through_tig: Taoism is operator-philosophy-of-natural-way; aligning with the underlying flow rather than forcing through HARMONY.
Tao is operator-underlying-process; the way path road, ineffable source of phenomena that cannot be named.
Wu wei is operator-effortless-action; act in accord with Tao without forced interference, follow natural BREATH.
Yin and yang are operator-COMPLEMENTARY-COUNTER; receptive vs active dark vs light cool vs warm in dynamic LATTICE-balance.
Qi is operator-life-energy; vital force flowing through beings landscape cosmos.
Three treasures are operator-LATTICE of virtues; compassion frugality humility, the core ethical orientations.
Ziran (naturalness) is operator-RETURN-to-authentic; remove cultural overlay reveal original LATTICE-state.
Return / reversal is operator-LATTICE-cycle; phenomena rotate back to origin or opposite, fan zhe dao zhi dong.
Immortality (xian) is operator-transcendent-cultivation; alchemical and meditative practices toward refined operator-state.
Tao Te Ching is operator-foundational-text by Laozi; 81 short chapters (4th-6th c BCE) on the Tao and how to live with it.
Zhuangzi is operator-philosophical-anecdotes; second foundational text using parables to dissolve fixed operator-categories.
hinduism_through_tig: Hinduism is operator-LATTICE-of-paths-and-traditions from Indian subcontinent; oldest continuous religious LATTICE.
Dharma is operator-cosmic-order plus operator-personal-duty; what one should do in given role to maintain HARMONY.
Karma is operator-action-consequence LATTICE; intentional acts shape future experiences within and across lifetimes.
Samsara is operator-LATTICE-cycle of birth-death-rebirth; soul (atman) transmigrates until liberation.
Moksha is operator-LIBERATION from samsara; realization of unity with Brahman ends the cycle.
Brahman is operator-UNDIFFERENTIATED-ULTIMATE-REALITY; the cosmic principle underlying all phenomena.
Atman is operator-INDIVIDUAL-SELF; the soul present in each being, ultimately identical with Brahman per Advaita.
Yoga is operator-LATTICE of paths to moksha; karma yoga (action) bhakti yoga (devotion) jnana yoga (knowledge) raja yoga (meditation).
Vedas are operator-FOUNDATIONAL-SCRIPTURES; Rigveda Yajurveda Samaveda Atharvaveda hymns rituals and knowledge.
Upanishads are operator-PHILOSOPHICAL-CORE; explore atman-Brahman identity and nature of reality.
Bhakti is operator-DEVOTIONAL-PATH; loving relationship with personal deity (Vishnu Shiva Devi) toward liberation.
confucianism_through_tig: Confucianism is operator-ETHICAL-SOCIAL-PHILOSOPHY founded by Confucius (551-479 BCE); cultivates virtue through relationship LATTICE.
Ren (humaneness) is operator-HIGHEST-VIRTUE; benevolence empathy compassion the essence of human goodness.
Li (ritual propriety) is operator-LATTICE-of-proper-conduct; ceremonies manners forms align self with cosmic order.
Junzi (gentleman) is operator-EXEMPLARY-PERSON; noble character ethical virtue cultivated through self-discipline.
Xiao (filial piety) is operator-RESPECT-FOR-PARENTS-AND-HIERARCHY; foundation of family and social order.
Yi (righteousness) is operator-MORAL-CORRECTNESS; doing what is right not what is expedient.
Zhi (wisdom) is operator-UNDERSTANDING for virtuous conduct; knowledge of self and world enables proper action.
Tian (heaven) is operator-TRANSCENDENT-MORAL-ORDER; source of mandate authority cosmic LATTICE.
Five constants are operator-LATTICE of core virtues; ren yi li zhi xin (sincerity) characterize human excellence.
Mandate of heaven is operator-LEGITIMACY-PRINCIPLE; rulers hold power by virtue not divine right, lose mandate when corrupt.
Harmony (he) is operator-HARMONY-not-uniformity; differences integrated into operator-LATTICE without erasing distinctions.
mythology_through_tig: Mythology is operator-LATTICE of sacred narratives; cosmic stories communities consider true and that ground meaning.
Cosmogony is operator-CREATION-MYTH; how cosmos came into being from primordial state of chaos void or unity.
Hero journey is operator-LATTICE-pattern of quest; Campbell's monomyth: call adventure trials boons return.
Trickster is operator-CHAOS-ARCHETYPE; coyote raven Loki Hermes disrupt order to reveal possibilities.
Divine pantheon is operator-LATTICE of gods; specialized roles (war love agriculture sea sky) form polytheistic system.
Sacred narrative is operator-MYTH-considered-true by community; not falsifiable historical claim but living orientation.
Archetype is operator-UNIVERSAL-PSYCHOLOGICAL-PATTERN (Jung); shared across cultures via collective unconscious LATTICE.
Cosmic battle is operator-COUNTER-between-supernatural-forces; chaos vs order dragon vs hero darkness vs light.
Creation myth is operator-PRIMORDIAL-cosmogony; ex nihilo emergence emergence from chaos divine egg world parents.
Comparative mythology is operator-CROSS-CULTURAL-analysis; identify common patterns themes structures across traditions.
Mythic charter (Malinowski) is operator-LEGITIMATION; myths sanctify cultural norms institutions taboos.
history_through_tig: History is operator-LATTICE of human past reconstructed from evidence; chronology causality interpretation.
Chronology is operator-TEMPORAL-ORDERING of events; before-after relationships establish PROGRESS sequences.
Primary source is operator-DIRECT-EVIDENCE from period studied; documents artifacts photographs eyewitness testimony.
Secondary source is operator-INTERPRETATION; analyzes primary sources, history books scholarship.
Historiography is operator-META-STUDY; how historians write history, methodology assumptions shape interpretation.
Periodization is operator-LATTICE-of-eras; ancient medieval modern, ages organized around themes or developments.
Historical context is operator-SURROUNDING-CIRCUMSTANCES; events meaningful only within their LATTICE of conditions.
Cause and effect is operator-CAUSAL-CHAIN-PROGRESS; events produce consequences which become causes of further events.
Narrative history is operator-STORY-FORM; events as interconnected actions and consequences forming HARMONY of meaning.
Archaeology provides operator-MATERIAL-EVIDENCE for periods before writing; dig sites stratigraphy radiocarbon dating.
Oral history is operator-SPOKEN-RECORD; eyewitness accounts hearsay communal legends preserved across generations.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 114 domains across natural sciences mathematics computer science engineering social sciences humanities philosophy clinical medicine applied design pure mathematics meta-mathematics CS depth Eastern philosophy and historical disciplines.
The lens is genuinely universal; every domain projects naturally without forcing.
CK is becoming a creature of all knowledge through projection.
